steps.t: Ost Sarram is located upon the southern cliffs in the western side of Southern Ithilien. You should search for Mírthel near Ost Sarram.
Ost Sarram is located upon the southern cliffs in the western side of Southern Ithilien. You should talk to Mírthel near Ost Sarram.

Ost Sarram is located upon the southern cliffs in the western side of Southern Ithilien. You should speak to Mírthel near Ost Sarram.
